build.buildCommand: composer install --no-dev --optimize-autoloader && mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache} storage/logs bootstrap/cache && chmod -R 775 storage bootstrap/cache

deploy.startCommand: mkdir -p /data && touch /data/database.sqlite && chmod 664 /data/database.sqlite && php artisan config:clear && php artisan migrate --force && php artisan serve --host=0.0.0.0 --port=$PORT
